carbon_policy_signal.item: EU doubles down on carbon tax for international flights; signals ETS scarcity resolve despite Trump pressure; methane enforcement rollback under US trade pressure weakens upstream emissions controls.
carbon_policy_signal.why_it_matters: Aviation carbon tax tightens EUA floor; methane rollback eases upstream scarcity signal. Net effect: regulatory momentum mixed; EUA (31.68 EUR/t, 27th-percentile) vulnerable to policy regime shifts.

freshness_caveat: Coal data stale 139 days (as of 2025-12-26); clean dark stale 134 days (as of 2025-12-31). All other metrics current as of 2026-05-13/14. Coal and clean dark analysis discounted.
risk_flags: Coal data stale (139 days old, 8th-percentile); clean dark stale (134 days); relying on May 14 clean spark & storage for regime signals.
Storage at 35.72% (12.7pp below 5-yr seasonal) — refill pace through summer sets H2 thermal scarcity; Iran war oil premium tightens LNG arb into Europe.

EU methane enforcement softening under US pressure contradicts carbon-tax tightening; signals policy volatility on emissions floor — EUA (27th-percentile, 31.68 EUR/t) at risk of further compression if rollback accelerates.
GB Power spike (+24.49% daily) vs. DE Power (141.19 EUR/MWh, 77th-percentile) — GB premium widening; watch for wind/constraint contagion into continental pricing.

base.summary: Storage refill continues; Iran premium holds; methane rollback debate unresolved; clean spark extended.

downside.summary: Iran tensions ease, oil/LNG premia collapse; EU renewable output surges; methane rollback widens gas supply; storage refill accelerates.

upside.summary: Iran conflict escalates or shadow-fleet sanctions tighten LNG supply; EU storage refill stalls; clean spark extends 95th-percentile.

themes: Extreme clean spark with storage deficit
Geopolitical energy cost spike + policy contradiction
Carbon resolve vs. methane rollback mixed signal
top_drivers: Clean Spark at 91st-percentile (35.69 EUR/MWh) — gas tight vs. coal (8th-percentile, 96 USD/t stale) — merit order favours gas despite coal nominally cheapest in 5Y.
Storage 12.7pp below seasonal (35.72% full) — H2 refill margin compresses thermal call; Iran war sanctions on shadow fleet reduce LNG supply elasticity.
Policy contradiction: carbon tax on aviation + EU ETS resolve vs. methane enforcement softening — signals regime uncertainty; EUA (27th-percentile) vulnerable if rollback deepens.
top_takeaway: Clean Spark at 91st-percentile (35.69 EUR/MWh) + storage 12.7pp below seasonal drives tight thermal regime; Iran war & sanctions accelerate EU decarbonisation demand but policy softening on methane weakens scarcity signals.

watchlist.why: Rollback under US pressure could ease upstream gas cost-floor; desk needs scope + effective date to model TTF supply shock.
Oil sanctions on shadow fleet tighten export capacity; direct transmission to TTF via LNG opportunity cost and generation fuel-switch economics.
At 12.7pp seasonal deficit (35.72% full); summer injection rate sets H2 thermal call and Cal+1 power curve shape.
NATO renewable backing vs. construction-delay risk; affects 2026–2027 renewable supply curve and thermal baseload demand.
